name: KINGSTONE COMPANIES, INC.
summary: Kingstone Companies, Inc. is a multi-line regional property and casualty insurance holding company operating primarily through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Kingstone Insurance Company (KICO), a New York-domiciled carrier. KICO writes personal lines (homeowners, dwelling fire, cooperative/condominium, renters, personal umbrella), livery physical damage, and canine legal liability policies through retail and wholesale agents and brokers. In 2024, KICO was the 12th largest writer of homeowners insurance in New York, with 98% of direct written premiums from New York in 2025.

products.name: Homeowners Insurance
products.description: Personal lines homeowners policies written primarily in New York through retail and wholesale producers.

products.name: Dwelling Fire Insurance
products.description: Personal lines dwelling fire policies offered through appointed producers.

products.name: Cooperative/Condominium Insurance
products.description: Personal lines policies for cooperative and condominium unit owners.

products.name: Renters Insurance
products.description: Personal lines renters policies offered through appointed producers.

products.name: Personal Umbrella Insurance
products.description: Personal lines umbrella liability policies offered through appointed producers.

products.name: Livery Physical Damage Insurance
products.description: Physical damage-only policies for livery vehicles, car services, and taxicabs; no liability coverage included.

products.name: Canine Legal Liability Insurance
products.description: Specialty policies covering legal liability related to canine incidents.

partnerships.description: Renewal rights agreement to offer replacement homeowners policies to selected AmGuard policyholders in Downstate New York as AmGuard withdrew from admitted personal lines business.
Sale of headquarters building and adjacent mixed-use property in Kingston, NY for $3,600,000, closed March 19, 2025.
